metadata.description: aiflow — a deterministic, stack-agnostic spec → build → validate pipeline for Claude Code.

plugins.name: aiflow
plugins.description: Deterministic, stack-agnostic dev pipeline. /setup detects your project and wires the best-suited tools/MCP into a committed profile so every developer gets the identical setup; then create → dev → test run section-by-section with a built-in build-discipline playbook. Works on web, backend, mobile, CLI, or library projects across Azure DevOps / Jira / Linear / GitHub issues, Figma or local designs, and Playwright or your own test runner.
